item.title: Books I read in 2016
item.description:
After a long limbo, I start out my blog again with my list of books. Here is the list of the books that I have read so far in 2016 and some which I am currently reading-

Read -

  • The Catcher in the Rye by J.D. Salinger
  • For Whom the Bell Tolls by Ernest Hemingway
  • Blink: The power of thinking without thinking by Malcolm Gladwell
  • Lean In: Women, Work, and the Will to Lead by Sheryl Sandberg.
  • Genocidal Organ by Project Itoh
  • The Little Prince by Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
  • Gray Mountain by John Grisham
  • Love in the Time of Cholera by Gabriel Garcia Marquez
  • The Remains of the Day by Kazuo Ishiguro

Currently Reading -

  • The Intelligent Investor by Benjamin Graham
  • The Whistler by John Grisham
  • Norwegian Wood by Haruki Murakami
  • The Chemist by Stephenie Meyer
  • Chromosome 6 by Robin Cook

Hope to Read-

  • The Motorcycle Diaries by Ernesto 'Che' Guevara …
item.dc:creator: Sourav Singh

item.title: Django Girls Second Edition in Pune
item.description:
After the first successful Django Girls in Pune, I received a mail asking me to join as a coach for Django Girls Pune second edition. After checking the schedule for August, I agreed on joining as a mentor for Django Girls Pune.

The workshop was happening on Satruday,6th August. Despite the rains, I managed to reach the event venue on time. At the venue, I met Rohit(event organizer) and Swapnil(mentor). We decide to wait for a while for all the mentors and students to arrive at the venue. There were in total seven mentors and around twenty-five participants.

Till then, We start work on blowing the Django Girls letter balloons and collecting together the swag. After a tiring ordeal, We weren't able to blow all the letter balloons successfully. But we really had an awesome amount of swag for our workshop, Thanks to the sponsors!

In my …
item.dc:creator: Sourav Singh

item.title: Hello World!
item.description:
After many years dilly-dallying, I have now decided to write a blog to extol out my views and knowledge to the people. I am looking forward to a nice experience, spending time to pen down my thoughts and sharing them to the world.

I shall be talking about my learnings over the years and some of my personal thoughts and experiences that I have gathered through the blog.

I shall also talk about open-source technologies and bioinformatics and occasionally my learnings in biology and neuroinformatics.

Thanks for spending the valuable time and I am looking forward to having a great time writing blog posts and interacting with people!
item.dc:creator: Sourav Singh
